title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: KLAMATH COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens tuberculosis case contacts and provides medical case management for those who test positive. 3314 Vandenberg Road Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Wednesday 10am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 882-8846 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 882-8846 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: May vary, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INFORMATION SERVICES - TOBACCO CESSATION PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
